stakeholderName.description: Formatted full name for the stakeholder

totalOutstandingShares.description: Total outstanding shares across all holdings for the stakeholder

totalCommonStockEquivalentShares.description: Total common equivalent (a.k.a. fully diluted) shares across all holdings for the stakeholder

percentOwnershipTotalOutstanding.description: Percentage representing the fraction of total outstanding shares across all holdings for the stakeholder

percentOwnershipTotalCommonStockEquivale.description: Percentage representing the fraction of total common equivalent (a.k.a. fully diluted) shares across all holdings for the stakeholder

designationsParticipated.description: List of all the designations a stakeholder has participated in

items.description: List of all the designations a stakeholder has participated in
